reasoning: Today, we're focusing on improving your lactate clearance and developing your aerobic base. Your last ride was below intensity at 60% FTP. This session targets the demands of the Alpine Loop, namely holding a steady power on climbs, and will enhance your fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 sets of 6-min Over-Unders: 3 min at 201-218W, 3 min at 242-256W; 2 min rest between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
